# markgrab

> Universal web content extraction — URL to LLM-ready markdown

## Purpose

Extracts content from web pages, YouTube videos, PDFs, and DOCX files and converts them to clean, LLM-ready markdown. Auto-detects content type from URL and falls back to browser rendering for JavaScript-heavy pages when Playwright is installed.

## Capabilities

- **HTML extraction**: Fetches web pages via httpx, parses with BeautifulSoup, converts to markdown via markdownify
- **YouTube transcripts**: Extracts video transcripts using youtube-transcript-api
- **PDF extraction**: Converts PDF documents to markdown via pdfplumber
- **DOCX extraction**: Converts Word documents to markdown via python-docx
- **Browser rendering**: Optional Playwright-based rendering for JS-heavy/SPA pages with auto-fallback
- **Output truncation**: Configurable max character limit (default 50,000)
- **Proxy support**: Route requests through HTTP proxies

## Installation

```
pip install markgrab
pip install markgrab[browser]    # + Playwright
pip install markgrab[youtube]    # + YouTube transcripts
pip install markgrab[pdf]        # + PDF support
pip install markgrab[all]        # everything
```

## Quick Use

### CLI

```bash
markgrab https://example.com
markgrab https://example.com --format json --max-chars 10000
markgrab https://youtube.com/watch?v=... --format text
markgrab https://example.com --browser --proxy http://proxy:8080
```

### Python

```python
from markgrab import extract

result = await extract("https://example.com", max_chars=50_000)
print(result.title, result.markdown, result.word_count, result.language)
```

### MCP

Server: `markgrab` (command: `markgrab-mcp`)
Tools: `extract_url`, `extract_multiple`

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/markgrab
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/markgrab/
- Source: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/markgrab
